text: Within this modern space, surrounded by glass, steel, and brightly colored walls proclaiming the virtues of research and development, I feel a cautious curiosity. The play of light and reflection makes everything appear transient and shifting. Here, human ingenuity is both celebrated and questioned, and I sense the tension between innovation and the unknown. My mind sharpens, alert and receptive, yet also slightly unmoored by the surreal, almost clinical atmosphere.
